mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_student
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, student_no, name, gender, class_name, phone, email FROM t_student ORDER BY student_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_student (student_no, name, gender, class_name, phone, email) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{className}, #{phone}, #{email})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_student SET student_no = #{studentNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, class_name = #{className}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_grade WHERE student_id = #{id}; DELETE FROM t_student WHERE id = #{id};
mapper.update: UPDATE t_student SET user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{id}
